name: Patient 19
history: Recurring relationship problems with husband Ivan. Work-related stress. Recently laid off and job searching. Father had successful career influencing expectations.
intermediate_belief: I'm not living up to my family's career expectations.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm failing at both career and marriage.
coping_strategies: Job searching, comparing self to spouse and father.
situation: Comparing personal career aspirations to those of spouse.
auto_thought: My spouse is advancing while I'm unemployed and lost.
